block_01: In trading it is not only important how you win, but also how you lose. All traders, no matter how professional and good, lose from time to time. But there is a catch: professional traders lose differently. Therefore, when they lose, they can quickly recover and continue their trading pursuit.
block_02: Novice traders, on the contrary, oftentimes treat trading like gambling, allocating too much money to a single deal. That is not the way to go. Learn proper risk management rules by reading this article!
block_04: Trading with the Center of Gravity Indicator
block_05: How many technical analysis indicators have been named after fundamental interactions? Well, there is at least one. The Center of Gravity excels at detecting trend reversal points and can be of great value to you.
block_07: What Indicators to Use for Day Trading?
block_08: Most technical analysis indicators perform relatively well on all time frames. However, when it comes to day trading, certain setups work better than the other. Learn what they are and how to use them correctly.
